title: lastrea gracilescens var. glanduligera
intro: Lastrea gracilescens var. glanduligera, also known as the glandular lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The glandular lady fern can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use.
